questions.context_sentence: Dan and Kate are married.
questions.cn: 丹和凯特结婚了。
questions.hint: mar(马) + ried(骑) -> 骑着马去结婚，所以是已婚的。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Dan and Kate are married.
questions.cn: 丹和凯特结婚了。

questions.context_sentence: Today is their 20th wedding anniversary.
questions.cn: 今天是他们结婚20周年纪念日。
questions.hint: anni(一年) + vers(转) + ary -> 一年转一圈，就是周年纪念日。

questions.context_sentence: Paul is in hospital.
questions.cn: 保罗住院了。
questions.hint: host(主人) + pit(深坑) + al -> 主人掉进深坑，被送到了医院。

questions.context_sentence: He has been in hospital since Monday.
questions.cn: 他自周一以来一直在住院。

questions.cn: 莎拉很久没有打电话了。
